description_long: This is a tall, freestanding floor-mounted faucet with a cylindrical base and a sleek, metallic finish, likely brass or bronze. The main spout features a high arc gooseneck design, providing ample clearance for filling large containers or for use with a freestanding bathtub. Attached to the side is a slender hand shower with a flexible hose, supported by a vertical bracket. The faucet includes a single lever handle for water control, positioned conveniently for easy access. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with smooth, rounded surfaces and a uniform metallic color. This type of fixture is commonly found in upscale urban bathrooms, spas, or outdoor bathing areas.
description: A tall, floor-mounted metallic faucet with a high arc spout, single lever handle, and a side-mounted hand shower with hose. The design is modern and sleek, suitable for freestanding tubs or luxury urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high arc spout, single lever handle, and the attached hand shower with hose clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the gooseneck spout and the cylindrical base, with the hand shower and handle less visible.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying both the spout and the hand shower, as well as the lever handle and hose attachment.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the gooseneck spout and the cylindrical support, with minimal detail of the handle or hand shower.
